title: RE:Constructed Wands
description: Unofficial NeoForge And Fabric Port of Construction Wand.
body:

![divider][divider]

![About][about-header]

![about-divider][about-divider]

**RE:Constructed Wands** is the ultimate building utility for Minecraft, designed to make large-scale construction
simple, efficient, and satisfying.  
A modern reimagining of the classic building wands, fully optimized for the latest versions of Minecraft
(**Fabric & NeoForge**).

[![Support on Ko-fi][kofi-banner]][kofi]

---

![section-divider][section-divider]

## 📜 Credits

- **ThetaDev** — Original author of  
  **[Construction Wand](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/construction-wand)**
- **NAIZO** — Porting, maintenance, and updates

---

![features-header][features-header]

### Powerful Wands

- **Stone Wand** — Up to 9 blocks
- **Iron Wand** — Up to 27 blocks
- **Diamond Wand** — Up to 128 blocks
- **Netherite Wand** — Up to 512 blocks
- **Infinity Wand** — Creative-only, unlimited

### Upgrade Cores

- **Construction Core** — Extend blocks in facing direction
- **Angel Core** — Place blocks mid-air or reverse-side
- **Destruction Core** — Remove placed blocks quickly

### Advanced Controls

- Direction Lock (Horizontal / Vertical / Axis)
- Undo last placement
- Optional Grid Snapping
- Smart fluid & block-state logic

![wand-preview-1][wand-preview-1]
![wand-preview-2][wand-preview-2]
